title: added tuning data updates
author: samy-oid
body:
### Summary
- Add tuning data updates for [dataset/task].
- Adjusted data preprocessing and tokenization in:
  - `data/...` (describe file)
  - `train_gpt.py` or `train_gpt_mlx.py` changes
- Included new record under `records/track_...` for reproducibility.

### Motivation
- Improve model convergence by incorporating [specific data variant].
- Fixes issue(s): `#<issue-number>` (if applicable).
- Aligns with goal: higher-quality 16MB parameter-golf training runs.

### Changes
- `data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py`: <brief bullet>
- `train_gpt.py`: <learning rate / WD / architecture changes>
- `records/track_.../README.md`: update with run notes
- Any new file/s or test data included.

### Validation
- Local/training check: test run sh command
  - `python3 train_gpt.py ...`
- Observed metrics:
  - loss ↓
  - ppl ↓
  - stability improvements in run log `records/.../train_v*.txt`

### Notes
- Requires `git push origin <branch>` before merge.
- Merging to `main` after review.
- Fallback: Additional follow-up commit if CI needs minor fix.
